column9: - I'm fine.________________you hear about Mr Watkins, the maths teacher?
column11: - He fell out of the window of his classroom! - _________________pushed him?
column13: - He was sitting on the windowsill and he just fell backwards!- Oh dear! Poor Mr Watkins. __________he turn?
column14: - No. Luckily his classroom is on the ground floor.- That's lucky! _____________you there at the time?
column15: - Yes! We were having a maths lesson.- So__________did you all do?
column16: - We ran outside to help him. We were all laughing, though! - ___________he think it was funny, too?- Not at first, but he laughed about it afterwards.
